headline: Entergy (ETR) Price Target Boosted at Morgan Stanley. Here is Why
summary: Entergy Corporation (NYSE:ETR) is included among the 12 Best Utility Stocks to Buy Now According to Hedge Funds. Entergy Corporation (NYSE:ETR) is an integrated US energy company that provides electricity to more than 3 million utility customers in Arkansas, Louisiana, Mississippi, and Texas. On June 24, Morgan Stanley analyst David Arcaro lifted the firm’s price […]

headline: BTIG Lowers Entergy (ETR) Price Target as Investor Day Highlights Sustainable Growth
summary: Entergy Corporation (NYSE:ETR) is included among Billionaire Steven Cohen’s Top 11 Dividend Stock Picks. On June 10, BTIG lowered its price recommendation on Entergy Corporation (NYSE:ETR) to $126 from $131. It reiterated a Buy rating on the shares. The firm said Entergy used its Investor Day to make a strong case for what it sees […]
